caption: In a formal indoor setting, several men are seated in chairs. The central figures include a man in a dark brown traditional outfit and a man in a dark suit who is leaning in to speak with him and gesturing with his hand. In the background, other individuals are visible, including one wearing a light-colored shawl. To the right, a large arrangement of yellow and red flowers sits on a table. Across the top of the scene, a red banner contains the white and yellow text "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". Below the footage, a blue banner displays the white text "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है". Small logos and a timestamp reading "10:01 PM" appear in the bottom right corner. As the sequence progresses, the man in the suit continues his close conversation with the man in brown, with slight shifts in their posture and expressions.
